constructors.pattern_signature: CY:      "CY"    is epsilon
Areg:    "A"     is ophi
ABreg:   AB      is ophi & AB
DPTRreg: DPTR    is ophi & DPTR
ADPTR:   "@A+"^DPTR is ophi & DPTR
APC:     "@A+PC"    is epsilon
ATDPTR:  "@"^DPTR   is ophi	& DPTR
Ri:      @ri       is ri
RiX:     @ri       is ri
Data:    "#"data   is data
Data16:  "#"data16 is data16
Data24:  "#"data24 is data24
Direct:  mainreg   is bank=0 & mainreg
Direct:  direct    is bank=1 & direct
Direct:  PSW       is bank=1 & direct=0xD0 & PSW
Direct:  "A"       is bank=1 & direct=0xE0
Direct:  B         is bank=1 & direct=0xF0 & B
Direct:  DPL       is bank=1 & direct=0x82 & DPL
Direct:  DPH       is bank=1 & direct=0x83 & DPH
Direct:  DPX       is bank=1 & direct=0x93 & DPX
Direct2:  mainreg2  is bank2=0 & mainreg2
Direct2: direct2   is bank2=1 & direct2
Direct2: PSW       is bank2=1 & direct2=0xD0 & PSW
Direct2: "A"       is bank2=1 & direct2=0xE0
Direct2:  B        is bank2=1 & direct2=0xF0 & B
Direct2:  DPL      is bank2=1 & direct2=0x82 & DPL
Direct2:  DPH      is bank2=1 & direct2=0x83 & DPH
Direct2:  DPX      is bank2=1 & direct2=0x93 & DPX
BitAddr:  bitaddr is bitbank=1 & sfrbyte & sfrbit [ bitaddr =(sfrbyte << 3)+sfrbit; ]
BitAddr:  bitaddr is bitbank=0 & lowbyte & sfrbit [ bitaddr =(lowbyte << 3)+sfrbit; ]
BitAddr2: "/"bitaddr is bitbank=1 & sfrbyte & sfrbit	 [ bitaddr =(sfrbyte << 3)+sfrbit; ]
BitAddr2: "/"bitaddr is bitbank=0 & lowbyte & sfrbit [ bitaddr =(lowbyte << 3)+sfrbit; ]
BitByteAddr: byteaddr 	is bitbank=1 & sfrbyte & sfrbit [ byteaddr =(sfrbyte << 3); ]
BitByteAddr: "A" 		is bitbank=1 & sfrbyte=0x1C & sfrbit
BitByteAddr: B 			is bitbank=1 & sfrbyte=0x1E & sfrbit & B
BitByteAddr: PSW 	    is bitbank=1 & sfrbyte=0x1A & sfrbit & PSW
BitByteAddr: byteaddr 	is bitbank=0 & lowbyte & sfrbit [ byteaddr = lowbyte + 0x20; ]
Addr19: relAddr is aopaddr & adata [ relAddr =(inst_next $and 0xf80000)+(aopaddr*256*256)+adata; ]
Addr24: addr24 is addr24
Rel8:   relAddr is rel8		     [ relAddr=inst_next+rel8; ]
Rel16:   relAddr is rel16		     [ relAddr=inst_next+rel16; ]
:ACALL  Addr19 is  $(GROUP1) & aaddrfill=1 & aoplo=1 & Addr19
:ADD Areg,rn      is $(GROUP2) & ophi=2          & Areg & rnfill=1 & rn
:ADD Areg,Direct  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=2 & oplo=5 & Areg; Direct
:ADD Areg,Ri      is $(GROUP2) & ophi=2          & Areg & rifill=3 & Ri
:ADD Areg,Data    is $(GROUP1) & ophi=2 & oplo=4 & Areg; Data
:ADDC Areg,rn     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=3          & Areg & rnfill=1 & rn
:ADDC Areg,Direct is $(GROUP1) & ophi=3 & oplo=5 & Areg; Direct
:ADDC Areg,Ri     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=3          & Areg & rifill=3 & Ri
:ADDC Areg,Data   is $(GROUP1) & ophi=3 & oplo=4 & Areg; Data
:AJMP Addr19 is  $(GROUP1) & aaddrfill=0 & aoplo=1 & Addr19
:ANL Areg,rn     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=5 & Areg & rnfill=1 & rn
:ANL Areg,Direct is $(GROUP1) & ophi=5 & oplo=5 & Areg; Direct
:ANL Areg,Ri     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=5 & Areg & rifill=3 & Ri
:ANL Areg,Data   is $(GROUP1) & ophi=5 & oplo=4 & Areg; Data
:ANL Direct,Areg is $(GROUP1) & ophi=5 & oplo=2 & Areg; Direct
:ANL Direct,Data is $(GROUP1) & ophi=5 & oplo=3; Direct; Data
:ANL CY,BitAddr   is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=8  & oplo=2; BitAddr  & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:ANL CY,BitAddr2  is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=11 & oplo=0; BitAddr2 & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:ANL CY,BitAddr   is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=8  & oplo=2; BitAddr  & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:ANL CY,BitAddr2  is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=11 & oplo=0; BitAddr2 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:CJNE Areg,Direct,Rel8 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=11 & oplo=5 & Areg; Direct; Rel8
:CJNE Areg,Data,Rel8   is $(GROUP1) & ophi=11 & oplo=4 & Areg; Data; Rel8
:CJNE rn,Data,Rel8     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=11 & rnfill=1 & rn; Data; Rel8
:CJNE Ri,Data,Rel8     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=11 & rifill=3 & Ri; Data; Rel8
:CLR Areg is $(GROUP1) & ophi=14 & oplo=4 & Areg
:CLR CY    is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=12 & oplo=3
:CLR BitAddr  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=12 & oplo=2; BitAddr & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:CLR BitAddr  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=12 & oplo=2; BitAddr & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:CPL Areg is $(GROUP2) & ophi=15 & oplo=4 & Areg
:CPL CY    is $(GROUP2) & CY & ophi=11 & oplo=3
:CPL BitAddr  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=11 & oplo=2; BitAddr & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:CPL BitAddr  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=11 & oplo=2; BitAddr & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:DA Areg    is $(GROUP1) & ophi=13 & oplo=4 & Areg
:DEC Areg   is $(GROUP1) & ophi=1 & oplo=4 & Areg
:DEC rn     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=1 & rnfill=1 & rn
:DEC Direct is $(GROUP1) & ophi=1 & oplo=5; Direct
:DEC Ri     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=1 & rifill=3 & Ri
:DIV ABreg     is $(GROUP1) & ophi=8 & oplo=4 & ABreg
:DJNZ rn,Rel8     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=13 & rnfill=1 & rnfill=1 & rn; Rel8
:DJNZ Direct,Rel8 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=13 & oplo=5; Direct; Rel8
:INC Areg    is $(GROUP1) & ophi=0 & oplo=4 & Areg
:INC rn      is $(GROUP2) & ophi=0 & rnfill=1 & rn
:INC Direct  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=0 & oplo=5; Direct
:INC Ri      is $(GROUP2) & ophi=0 & rifill=3 & Ri
:INC DPTRreg is $(GROUP1) & ophi=10 & oplo=3 & DPTRreg
:JB  BitAddr,Rel8 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=2 & oplo=0; BitAddr & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr; Rel8
:JBC BitAddr,Rel8 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=1 & oplo=0; BitAddr & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr; Rel8
:JB  BitAddr,Rel8 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=2 & oplo=0; BitAddr & sfrbit & BitByteAddr; Rel8
:JBC BitAddr,Rel8 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=1 & oplo=0; BitAddr & sfrbit & BitByteAddr; Rel8
:JC  Rel8  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=4 & oplo=0; Rel8
:JMP ADPTR is $(GROUP1) & ophi=7 & oplo=3 & ADPTR
:JNB BitAddr,Rel8 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=3 & oplo=0; BitAddr & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr; Rel8
:JNB BitAddr,Rel8 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=3 & oplo=0; BitAddr & sfrbit & BitByteAddr; Rel8
:JNC Rel8 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=5 & oplo=0; Rel8
:JNZ Rel8 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=7 & oplo=0; Rel8
:JZ Rel8  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=6 & oplo=0; Rel8
:LCALL Addr24 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=1 & oplo=2; Addr24
:LJMP Addr24  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=0 & oplo=2; Addr24
:MOV Areg,rn        is $(GROUP2) & ophi=14 & rnfill=1 & rn & Areg
:MOV Areg,Direct    is $(GROUP1) & ophi=14 & oplo=5 & Areg; Direct
:MOV Areg,Ri        is $(GROUP2) & ophi=14 & Areg & rifill=3 & Ri
:MOV Areg,Data      is $(GROUP1) & ophi=7 & oplo=4 & Areg; Data
:MOV rn,Areg        is $(GROUP2) & ophi=15 & rnfill=1 & rn & Areg
:MOV rn,Direct      is $(GROUP2) & ophi=10 & rnfill=1 & rn; Direct
:MOV rn,Data        is $(GROUP2) & ophi=7 & rnfill=1 & rn; Data
:MOV Direct,Areg    is $(GROUP1) & ophi=15 & oplo=5 & Areg; Direct
:MOV Direct,rn      is $(GROUP2) & ophi=8 & rnfill=1 & rn; Direct
:MOV Direct2,Direct is $(GROUP1) & ophi=8 & oplo=5; Direct; Direct2
:MOV Direct,Ri      is $(GROUP2) & ophi=8 & rifill=3 & Ri; Direct
:MOV Direct,Data    is $(GROUP1) & ophi=7 & oplo=5; Direct; Data
:MOV Ri,Areg        is $(GROUP2) & ophi=15 & rifill=3 & Ri & Areg
:MOV Ri,Direct      is $(GROUP2) & ophi=10 & rifill=3 & Ri; Direct
:MOV Ri,Data        is $(GROUP2) & ophi=7 & rifill=3 & Ri; Data
:MOV DPTRreg,Data24 is $(GROUP1) & ophi=9 & oplo=0 & DPTRreg; Data24
:MOV CY,BitAddr is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=10 & oplo=2;  BitAddr & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:MOV BitAddr,CY is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=9  & oplo=2;  BitAddr & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:MOV CY,BitAddr is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=10 & oplo=2;  BitAddr & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:MOV BitAddr,CY is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=9  & oplo=2;  BitAddr & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:MOVC  Areg,ADPTR is $(GROUP1) & ophi=9 & oplo=3 & ADPTR & Areg
:MOVC  Areg,APC   is $(GROUP1) & ophi=8 & oplo=3 & APC   & Areg
:MOVX  Areg,RiX     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=14 & rifill=1 & RiX & Areg
:MOVX  Areg,ATDPTR  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=14 & oplo=0 & Areg & ATDPTR
:MOVX  RiX,Areg     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=15 & rifill=1 & RiX & Areg
:MOVX  ATDPTR,Areg  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=15 & oplo=0 & Areg & ATDPTR
:MUL ABreg         is $(GROUP1) & ophi=10 & oplo=4 & ABreg
:NOP             is $(GROUP1) & ophi=0  & oplo=0
:ORL Areg,rn     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=4 & rnfill=1 & rn & Areg
:ORL Areg,Direct is $(GROUP1) & ophi=4 & oplo=5 & Areg; Direct
:ORL Areg,Ri     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=4 & Areg & rifill=3 & Ri
:ORL Areg,Data   is $(GROUP1) & ophi=4 & oplo=4 & Areg; Data
:ORL Direct,Areg is $(GROUP1) & ophi=4 & oplo=2 & Areg; Direct
:ORL Direct,Data is $(GROUP1) & ophi=4 & oplo=3 & Areg; Direct; Data
:ORL CY,BitAddr  is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=7  & oplo=2; BitAddr  & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:ORL CY,BitAddr2 is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=10 & oplo=0; BitAddr2 & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:ORL CY,BitAddr  is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=7  & oplo=2; BitAddr  & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:ORL CY,BitAddr2 is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=10 & oplo=0; BitAddr2 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:POP  Direct is $(GROUP1) & ophi=13 & oplo=0; Direct
:PUSH Direct is $(GROUP1) & ophi=12 & oplo=0; Direct
:RET  is $(GROUP1) & ophi=2 & oplo=2
:RETI is $(GROUP1) & ophi=3 & oplo=2
:RL   Areg is $(GROUP1) & ophi=2 & oplo=3 & Areg
:RLC  Areg is $(GROUP1) & ophi=3 & oplo=3 & Areg
:RR   Areg is $(GROUP1) & ophi=0 & oplo=3 & Areg
:RRC  Areg is $(GROUP1) & ophi=1 & oplo=3 & Areg
:SETB  CY is $(GROUP1) & CY & ophi=13 & oplo=3
:SETB BitAddr is $(GROUP1) & ophi=13 & oplo=2; BitAddr & bitaddr57=7 & sfrbit3=0 & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:SETB BitAddr is $(GROUP1) & ophi=13 & oplo=2; BitAddr & sfrbit & BitByteAddr
:SJMP Rel8        is $(GROUP1) & ophi=8 & oplo=0; Rel8
:SUBB Areg,rn     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=9 & rnfill=1 & rn & Areg
:SUBB Areg,Direct is $(GROUP1) & ophi=9 & oplo=5 & Areg; Direct
:SUBB Areg,Ri     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=9 & Areg & rifill=3 & Ri
:SUBB Areg,Data   is $(GROUP1) & ophi=9 & oplo=4 & Areg; Data
:SWAP  Areg       is $(GROUP1) & ophi=12 & oplo=4 & Areg
:XCH  Areg,rn     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=12 & rnfill=1 & rn & Areg
:XCH  Areg,Direct is $(GROUP1) & ophi=12 & oplo=5 & Areg; Direct
:XCH  Areg,Ri     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=12 & rifill=3 & Ri & Areg
:XCHD Areg,Ri    is ophi=13 & Areg & rifill=3 & Ri
:XRL Areg,rn     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=6 & rnfill=1 & rn & Areg
:XRL Areg,Direct is $(GROUP1) & ophi=6 & oplo=5 & Areg; Direct
:XRL Areg,Ri     is $(GROUP2) & ophi=6 & rifill=3 & Ri & Areg
:XRL Areg,Data   is $(GROUP1) & ophi=6 & oplo=4 & Areg; Data
:XRL Direct,Areg is $(GROUP1) & ophi=6 & oplo=2 & Areg; Direct
:XRL Direct,Data is $(GROUP1) & ophi=6 & oplo=3; Direct; Data
